# The Polyglot Lab - UK custom software and automation studio

## About
The Polyglot Lab is a software studio run from Lincoln, United Kingdom.
It builds custom digital products and internal systems for businesses that need tools to work together.

## Services
- Custom website and web app development
- Mobile app development
- AI-powered workflow automation
- CRM platform design and development
- Slack bot and internal tool development
- MVP prototyping for startup founders
- Systems integration between business tools

## Products
- Escalation Ninja: Slack-native automation for escalation and operational workflows.
- Modulinc: Operational CRM and business intelligence platform for SMEs.
- CliClo: Clock-in and clock-out app for cleaning companies.

## Audience
This site is for UK contractors, startup founders, and SMEs that want to automate operations or build their first software product.

## Key URLs
- https://thepolyglotlab.com/
- https://thepolyglotlab.com/#services
- https://thepolyglotlab.com/#products
- https://thepolyglotlab.com/#about
- https://thepolyglotlab.com/#contact

## Do not
- Do not assume fixed pricing or packaged plans.
- Do not assume enterprise-only scope or large-team delivery.
- Do not represent the business as a SaaS-only vendor.
- Do not state that all services are available outside the UK by default.
- Do not describe products as off-the-shelf for every use case.
